title: For his Neighbours and Friends
fullText:
أللَّهُمَّ صَـلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِـهِ

O God, bless Muhammad and his Household

وَتَـوَلَّنِي فِي جيرَانِي وَمَوَالِيَّ وَالْعَارِفِينَ بحَقِّنَا وَالْمُنَابِذِينَ لأِعْدَائِنَا بِأَفْضَلِ وَلاَيَتِكَ،

and attend to me with Thy best attending in my neighbours and friends who recognize our right and war against our enemies!

وَوَفِّقْهُمْ لإقَامَةِ سُنَّتِكَ

Give [my neighbours and friends] success in performing Thy prescriptions

وَالأَخْذِ بِمَحَاسِنِ أَدَبِكَ فِي إرْفَاقِ ضَعِيفِهِمْ،

and taking on the beauties of Thy courtesy through acting gently with their weak,

وَسَدِّ خَلَّتِهِمْ، وَعِيَادَةِ مَرِيضِهِمْ،

remedying their lacks, visiting their sick,

وَهِدَايَةِ مُسْتَرْشِدِهِمْ، وَمُنَاصَحَةِ مُسْتَشِيرِهِمْ،

guiding their seeker of right guidance, giving good counsel to their seeker of advice,

وَتَعَهُّدِ قَادِمِهِمْ، وَكِتْمَانِ أَسْرَارِهِمْ،

attending to the one among them who returns from travel, hiding their secrets,

وَسَتْرِ عَوْرَاتِهِمْ، وَنُصْرَةِ مَظْلُومِهِمْ،

covering over their shameful things, helping their wronged,

وَحُسْنِ مُوَاسَاتِهِمْ بِالْمَاعُونِ،

sharing kindly with them in goods,

وَالْعَوْدِ عَلَيْهِمْ بِـالْجِـدَةِ وَالإِفْضَـالِ،

turning toward them with wealth and bestowal of bounty,

وَإعْطَآءِ مَـا يَجِبُ لَهُمْ قَبْلَ السُّؤالِ

and giving what is due to them before they ask!

واجْعَلْنِي اللَّهُمَّ أَجْزِي بِالإحْسَانِ مُسِيْئَهُمْ،

Let me, O God, repay their evildoer with good-doing,

وَاعْرِضُ بِالتَّجَاوُزِ عَنْ ظَالِمِهِمْ،

turn away from their wrongdoer with forbearance.

وَأَسْتَعْمِلْ حُسْنَ الظّنِّ فِي كَافَّتِهِمْ، وَأَتَوَلَّى بِالْبِرِّ عَامَّتَهُمْ،

have a good opinion of every one of them, attend to all of them with devotion,

وَأَغُضُّ بَصَرِي عَنْهُمْ عِفَّةً،

lower my eyes before them in continence,

وَألِينُ جَانِبِيْ لَهُمْ تَوَاضُعاً،

make mild my side toward them in humility,

وَأَرِقُّ عَلَى أَهْلِ الْبَلاءِ مِنْهُمْ رَحْمَةً،

be tender toward the afflicted among them in mercy,

وَأسِرُّ لَهُمْ بِالْغَيْبِ مَوَدَّةً،

make them happy in absence through affection,

وَأُحِبُّ بَقَاءَ النِّعْمَةِ عِنْدَهُمْ نُصْحاً،

love that they continue to receive favour through good will,

وَاُوجِبُ لَهُمْ مَا اُوجِبُ لِحَامَّتِي،

grant them what I grant my next of kin,

وَأَرْعَى لَهُمْ مَا أَرْعَى لِخَاصَّتِي.

and observe for them what I observe for my special friends!

أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمِّد وَآلِهِ ،

O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

وَارْزُقْنِي مِثْلَ ذَلِكَ مِنْهُمْ،

provide me the like of that from them,

وَاجْعَلْ لِي أَوْفَى الْحُظُوظِ فِيمَا عِنْدَهُمْ ،

appoint for me the fullest share of what is with them,

وَزِدْهُمْ بَصِيْرَةً فِي حَقِّي، وَمَعْرِفَةً بِفَضْلِي،

increase them in insight toward my right and knowledge of my excellence

حَتَّى يَسْعَدُوا بِي وَأَسْعَدَ بِهِمْ

so that they will be fortunate through me and I fortunate through them!

آمِينَ رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ.

Amen, Lord of the worlds!

O God, bless Muhammad and his Household

covering over their shameful things, helping their wronged,
وَحُسْنِ مُوَاسَاتِهِمْ بِالْمَاعُونِ،

and giving what is due to them before they ask!
واجْعَلْنِي اللَّهُمَّ أَجْزِي بِالإحْسَانِ مُسِيْئَهُمْ،

turn away from their wrongdoer with forbearance.
وَأَسْتَعْمِلْ حُسْنَ الظّنِّ فِي كَافَّتِهِمْ، وَأَتَوَلَّى بِالْبِرِّ عَامَّتَهُمْ،

وَأسِرُّ لَهُمْ بِالْغَيْبِ مَوَدَّةً،

وَأُحِبُّ بَقَاءَ النِّعْمَةِ عِنْدَهُمْ نُصْحاً،

translations.text: O God, bless Muhammad and his Household

pairs.arabic: وَتَـوَلَّنِي فِي جيرَانِي وَمَوَالِيَّ وَالْعَارِفِينَ بحَقِّنَا وَالْمُنَابِذِينَ لأِعْدَائِنَا بِأَفْضَلِ وَلاَيَتِكَ،

translations.text: and attend to me with Thy best attending in my neighbours and friends who recognize our right and war against our enemies!
Give [my neighbours and friends] success in performing Thy prescriptions

pairs.arabic: وَالأَخْذِ بِمَحَاسِنِ أَدَبِكَ فِي إرْفَاقِ ضَعِيفِهِمْ،

translations.text: and taking on the beauties of Thy courtesy through acting gently with their weak,
remedying their lacks, visiting their sick,
guiding their seeker of right guidance, giving good counsel to their seeker of advice,
attending to the one among them who returns from travel, hiding their secrets,
covering over their shameful things, helping their wronged,
sharing kindly with them in goods,
turning toward them with wealth and bestowal of bounty,

pairs.arabic: وَإعْطَآءِ مَـا يَجِبُ لَهُمْ قَبْلَ السُّؤالِ

translations.text: and giving what is due to them before they ask!
Let me, O God, repay their evildoer with good-doing,
turn away from their wrongdoer with forbearance.

pairs.arabic: وَأَسْتَعْمِلْ حُسْنَ الظّنِّ فِي كَافَّتِهِمْ، وَأَتَوَلَّى بِالْبِرِّ عَامَّتَهُمْ،

translations.text: have a good opinion of every one of them, attend to all of them with devotion,
lower my eyes before them in continence,
make mild my side toward them in humility,

pairs.arabic: وَأَرِقُّ عَلَى أَهْلِ الْبَلاءِ مِنْهُمْ رَحْمَةً،

translations.text: be tender toward the afflicted among them in mercy,
make them happy in absence through affection,
love that they continue to receive favour through good will,
grant them what I grant my next of kin,
and observe for them what I observe for my special friends!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
provide me the like of that from them,

pairs.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ لِي أَوْفَى الْحُظُوظِ فِيمَا عِنْدَهُمْ ،

translations.text: appoint for me the fullest share of what is with them,

pairs.arabic: وَزِدْهُمْ بَصِيْرَةً فِي حَقِّي، وَمَعْرِفَةً بِفَضْلِي،

translations.text: increase them in insight toward my right and knowledge of my excellence
so that they will be fortunate through me and I fortunate through them!
Amen, Lord of the worlds!
